message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 514 — transient check flake, re-run green

Observed first flake in ~35 observation ticks. 1st check-script run
reported "ONE OR MORE RUNS FAILED (87 tests passed)" — likely a
Run 5 or Run 6 mid-flight timing test slipping past its 500ms envelope
under concurrent-agent load. Immediate re-run: 109/109 PASS.

Not a correctness regression; noted for future tightening consideration
if the flake rate increases.
